programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Dayton, Ohio, tensions between two families boil over as both sides accuse the other's children of bullying. In Alabama, an off-duty police officer is struck by a neighbor furious over loud music. And in Florida, a woman's frustration over backyard noise turns destructive when she punches a hole straight through her neighbor's fence.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: During renovations, Andrew's Philadelphia home was taken over by squatters who moved in, changed the locks, and installed security cameras; what begins as a straightforward case quickly escalates into a tense standoff with authorities, as Flash and his team attempt to reclaim the property without any help from the neighborhood.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Washington, health issues forced Zachary out of his dream home; he rented it to seemingly trustworthy tenants-only to realize they were alleged serial squatters who stopped paying and refused to leave; in one of his toughest fights yet, can Flash and his team take this home back?

programme.title: Evict My Kid
programme.desc: Two fed-up families take on a 30-day eviction process to finally push their adult children out of the nest; Michelle seeks help from a Failure to Launch expert to navigate her tumultuous relationship with her live-in son Jacob.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Tennessee, a woman finds her neighbor's door mat offensive and tells him so; a fight breaks out between two players on the same team during a pick-up basketball game in Saint Paul, Minnesota.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: An East London woman battles a swarm of her neighbor's bees taking over her bedroom; in Texas, a new mother is shocked to witness her neighbor playing with fire; a Georgia farmer temporarily blocks a school bus.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In California, a routine house move turns tense when one neighbor pushes back on cul-de-sac access.
